title: Fix blank fullscreen PDF workspace (dbg96)
description: Fullscreen PDF workspace was blank because scrollport lock used stacked 72vh layout inside the fixed overlay, and split-piece PDFs often load from page.src rather than archive read-url. dbg96 uses flex-fill scrollport in fullscreen, single render on open, page.src fallback for per-piece loads, and sessionStorage diag log hpPlanFullscreenDiagLog.
changeLog: Fullscreen scrollport: flex fill instead of 72vh stacked pane lock.
Single render on fullscreen open (skipRender) + finalize mount.
Continuous viewer: load from page.src when read-url unavailable.
Force initial slot render on mount.
Diag: hpPlanFullscreenDiagLog in sessionStorage during fullscreen.
